---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a safe feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Feature summary

Describe the feature.

## Problem it solves

What user need or project goal does it support?

## Proposed solution

Describe your idea.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches could work?

## Risk and safety considerations

Could this feature affect:

- privacy?
- security?
- legal language?
- doxing risk?
- witness safety?
- misinformation risk?
- platform abuse?

## Review needed

- [ ] Product review
- [ ] Legal review
- [ ] Security/privacy review
- [ ] Methodology review
- [ ] Design/accessibility review
